content: Elenwen: Ah, the mighty housecarl of the so-called Dragonborn. How quaint. Shouldn’t you be busy polishing his boots or spreading your legs for him like the good little Nord whore you are? Lydia: Shut your elven cunt mouth before I cleave it in half with my greatsword. At least my people don’t grovel to imaginary elven supremacy like pathetic dogs. Elenwen: Such vulgarity. Typical of your brutish kind. Tell me, does your master know you fantasize about him while you finger that wet cunt of yours at night? Or does he just use you as a warm hole when that vampire slut Serana isn’t around? Lydia: Hah! Says the bitch who licks Dominion boots for a living. Bet you’d suck an elven councilman’s cock under this very table if they asked. At least I serve a true Nord hero, not some limp-dicked Thalmor politician. Elenwen: Oh, don’t flatter yourself. hero Oh, I do hope he tries. I’d love to see him beg for mercy when my justiciars drag him to Northwatch—I’ll make sure you watch before we throw you in the same cell. Lydia: I’d carve my way out with your fucking spine. Try it, bitch. Elenwen: Such fire. No wonder your kind is tearing this province apart.

Elenwen: Wasteful bravado. Enjoy your little rebellion while it lasts—when the Dominion crushes it beneath our heel, you’ll learn what true power looks like. Lydia: Let ‘em come. Every Thalmor head I split open just makes my next fuck with MJR sweeter. Now piss off before I decorate these fancy walls with your entrails.
